_comment: AI draft — Sale batch. Theme: unify VOID to the locked term Tirtir (was inconsistently 'ka noqo' / 'joojin' / 'baabi'i', plus 2 camelCase bugs 'LagaNoqday'/'KaNoqo'). Plus Cash->Kaash consistency + DONE consistency. Only changed keys listed; the rest of Sale is left as-is. ⚠ = please confirm.
saleDetailVoidButton: was 'Ka noqo IIBKA'; unify to Tirtir
saleVoidConfirmTitle: was 'Ka noqo iibkan?'; question kept, Tirtir
saleVoidFailedMessage: Iibka lama tirtiri karin. Isku day mar kale.
saleVoidConfirmBody: Iibka waa la tirtiri doonaa, alaabta bakhaarka waa lugu celin doonaa, deynta macmiilkana waa la tirtiri doonaa.
saleVoidErrorOwnerOnly: Kaliya milkiilaha dukaanka ayaa tirtiri kara iibka.
saleVoidErrorWindowExpired: Goorta way dhammaatay — iibyada waxaa la tirtiri karaa 7 maalmood gudahood.
saleVoidErrorRefundExceedsPaid: Soo-celintu kama badnaan karto lacagta kaashka.
